meta.house: WEF Sporthorse Auction powered by VDL Stud

horses.name: VDL Nevena, mare by Douglas VDL born 2018
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Nevena - Mare - Bay - Born: 2018 - Height: M - Competing at 1.20m level

VDL Nevena is a daughter of Douglas whom has produced many great Grand Prix horses. VDL Nevena is a young mare that is very easy to ride and gives the rider confidence. She has a good canter with easy lead changes. She jumps with a very nice technique , good use of her body and has good scope. VDL Nevena is a delightful horse to ride and has the potential to be competitive at Amateur level but also at Professional level.

Sire: Douglas is a true sporthorse producer and brings in the incredible power and scope of both Darco and Capitol I. In breeding, Douglas produced some world-class showjumpers, such as Calgary winner Suma’s Zorro, Dougie Douglas, Coral Springs, Dallas VDL, James van de Oude Heihoef and more.

Dam: Fleur is a daughter of the highly rewarded Indoctro – one of the best dam’s sires you will find. The combination with Baloubet du Rouet, Concorde and Ramiro Z lays a very strong foundation for the pedigree of Fleur. 

Closely related to: VDL Nevena’s damline has produced multiple successful horses over the years. One famous example is H&M Extra of Olivier Philippaerts and later on Jorge Matte Capdevilla. H&M Extra competed at the very highest level and even jumped 1.70m tracks. His full brother More Than Extra became a 1.60m Grand Prix showjumper as well, ridden by Samuel Hutton and Nora Gray.

horses.name: VDL Martini, gelding by Zapatero VDL born 2017
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Martini - Gelding - Chestnut - Born: 2017 - Height: L - Competing at 1.35m level

VDL Martini is a son of VDL Zapatero who competed very succesfully at Grand Prix level with top rider Jessica Kuerten. VDL Martini was gelded late and so developed into a great well musceled gelding. His fancy type is combined with a very good canter that is very comfortable and easy to ride. He jumps with a lot of reflex, good use of his body and good scope. VDL Martini is a horse that suits a lot of jobs and has the potential to be a competitive horse at all kind of levels.

Sire: Zapatero VDL was himself a Grand Prix showjumper with Jessica Kürten and unites the valuable genes of two-time Olympic stallion Chin Chin and Ircolando. In breeding, Zapatero VDL produced Grand Prix showjumpers such as BG Ziro Percent, Gamira and Magic Mike.

Dam: Hakilly D Z is bred out of the famous Hilly damline and is herself a daughter of the ‘Preferent’ awarded stallion Harley VDL. Hakilly D Z produced the KWPN approved stallion Nickelson VDL and Martini VDL was himself an approved stallion by DSP.

Closely related to: Great-granddam Takilly brings in the valuable genes of the legendary Libero H and stood at the basis of multiple international showjumpers. This damline also produced 1.60m showjumpers such as Chippendale’s Boy DZ, Maurits, Dahilly, Zero Z, Wilma Killy R, Zidane D, Repper, Tornado R, Darcon, Turbo R, Caspar SSB, Carpaccio, Zargo Z and the highly successful Swedish showjumper For Killy.

horses.name: VDL Hashmirita, mare by Kashmir van 't Schuttershof born 2012
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Hashmirita - mare - Bay - Born: 2012 Height: L - Competing at 1.40m level

VDL Hashmirita is a daughter of Kashmir van het Schuttershof the top sire that produced top horses such as the great Gazelle ridden by Kent Farrington and H&M All Inn ridden by Peder Fredericson. VDL Hashmirita is a mare with the best mentality. She is super easy to ride, light, blood, a winner, efficient and has a great instinct in the course. She jumps with a very good technique, quick take off and has good scope. VDL Hashmirita is a dream mare for everyone who is looking for a real friend to jump and be competitive at all Amateur levels.

Sire: Kashmir van Schuttershof can be considered one of the best stallions of recent years. H&M All In, H&M Indiana, Reveur de Hurtebise HDC, Gazelle – the list of world-class showjumpers is almost endless.

Dam: Tarita HC is a former 1.30m showjumper and is sired by the great Corland. In addition, Tarita HC produced multiple sporthorses and her dam performed in sport as well.

Closely related to: VDL Hashmirita is bred out of a damline with many KWPN predicates and sporthorses as well. She is for example related to Casino Calvin, who competes up to 1.55m level with Canadian rider Kyle Timm.

horses.name: VDL Mourinho, gelding by Etoulon VDL born 2017
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Mourinho - Gelding - Bay - Born: 2017 - Height: L - Competing at 1.30m level

VDL Mourinho is a son of Etoulon VDL who was successful himself at International Level with Jur Vrieling but also is getting more and more known as producer of horses at the International Level. VDL Mourinho is a horse with a very good model, a real eyecatcher. He is very comfortable to ride with a very supple and balanced canter. He jumps with a very quick take off, lot of bascule, careful and has scope. He is a horse with a lot of potential and is a horse that everyone would like to have at the barn.

Sire: Etoulon VDL has been one of the best of his generation from day one. He jumps with an incredible technique and athleticism and passes these features on to his offspring. Striking horses such as Jordan Molga M (Nicolas Delmotte), Opaline de W&S (Petronella Andersson), Obama van Ostaayen (Abdel Saïd), Ebanking (Joseph Stockdale) and Itoulavsca Fortuna (Jodie Hall McAteer) are all sired by the great Etoulon VDL.

Dam: Ganea is a daughter of the Chin Chin son Classe VDL out of the Nimmerdor mare Linea. Ganea herself has a Holsteiner background as does this damline Holsteiner line 2554. Granddam Linea stood at the basis of many successful sporthorses and also of multiple KWPN champions. 

Closely related to: VDL Mourinho’s family is full of successful sporthorses and also of multiple successful horses in the KWPN Mare Shows and KWPN Tests. Furthermore, this damline produced international Grand Prix horses such as Cashflow (Jörg Naeve), Cetello (Uma O’Neill), Call Me Carly (Dominik Fuhrer), Cara Cuma (Mathias Schibli), Lando (Jan Vehar), Catcher (Janne Friederike Meyer Zimmermann), Sheila III (Markus Kölz) and Camsey (Patrik Majher).

horses.name: VDL Korada de Trebox, mare by Kannan born 2017
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Korada de Trebox - Mare - Bay - Born: 2017 - Height: L - Competing at 1.30m level

VDL Korada de Trebox is a mare that is very well bred from two top sires, Kannan and Diamant de Semilly. VDL Korada de Trebox has started her International classes in the 6 year olds with great results. She is a good sporthorse type. Good front end and good length with balance in the canter. She is a carefull but brave mare that jumps with a good technique good use of the body over the jump and has scope. VDL Korada de Trebox: Talent and Rideability.

Sire: Kannan is without a doubt one of the greatest sires of all-time. He is the sire of Olympic champion Nino des Buissonnets, the World Cup Final winner Albführen’s Paille and world-class horses like Quabri de l’Isle, James Kann Cruz, MoM’s Toupie de la Roque, GL Events Dorai d’Aiguilly, Molly Malone V, Hernandez TN N.O.P. and many more.

Dam: Disere de Trebox Z is a Zangersheide bred mare by the legendary French stallion Diamant de Semilly out of a highly successful Holsteiner family. She goes back to the Holsteiner line 2178.

Closely related to: VDL Korada de Trebox goes back to the international showjumping mare Thekla S. This daughter of Acorado I competed up to 1.55m level with Andreas Brenner, Cian O’Connor and Michael Duffy. This damline also produced 1.60m showjumpers Classic Man V (Toni Hassmann), Cornet MM (Alain Jufer), Crazy Girl V (André Thieme), Chelsea Jmen (Guilherme Dutra Foroni) and Clementine (Florian Meyer zu Hartum).

horses.name: VDL Nimrod ES, gelding by Candy du Nantuel born 2018
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Nimrod ES - Gelding - Chestnut - Born: 2018 - Height: L - Competing at 1.10m level

VDL Nimrod ES is a son of the very talented Candy Du Nanturel crossed with Casall who everyone knows from his outstanding career with Rolf Goran Bengstson. VDL Nimrod is a very correctly built gelding. He has a very good presence about him. He has a great mentality with the right amount of blood and a very good canter. VDL Nimrod is a careful horse with a lot of scope, and uses his haunches very well. VDL Nimrod ES has all the potential to develop into a Grand Prix horse.

Sire: Candy de Nantuel has been one of the highlights of his generation from day one – both for breeding and for sport. The son of Luidam is bred out of dam by Diamant de Semilly and is closely related to countless of international Grand Prix showjumpers. In sport, Candy de Nantuel competes up to Grand Prix level with Pénélope Leprévost. In breeding, multiple offspring are breaking through at international level and in addition, he produced already 11 approved stallions.

Dam: Walisa is a daughter of the world-famous Casall and competed herself up to 1.30m level in sport. With Casall and the Holsteiner stallion Sacramento Son a solid foundation was laid for the pedigree of Walisa. Eventually, Walisa traces back to Holsteiner line 628B.

Closely related to: VDL Nimrod ES is a product of both the French stallion Candy de Nantuel and a Holsteiner background. This family produced international showjumpers such as Casillero H (Artemus de Almeida), Classic H (Toni Hassmann), Amaretto SBK Z (Damian Ostrega) and Lady van de Haarter Hoeve (Fernando Martinez Sommer).

horses.name: VDL Adancha Z, mare by Aktion Pur born 2018
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Adancha - Mare - Grey - Born: 2018 - Height: L - Competing at 1.20m level

VDL Adancha Z is a daughter of Grand Prix stallion Aktion Pur Z combined with Grand Prix stallion Up To Date. VDL Adancha is a mare that has promise for the future, with her good sportbody and powerful canter, this horse shows all the scope at the jump and has a great technique, quick take off and great reach over the jump. VDL Adancha is a Grand Prix prospect.

Sire: Aktion Pur Z was a spectacular showjumper himself, ridden by Judy-Ann Melchior. Aktion Pur Z won the Nations Cup of La Baule, placed 2nd in the Global Champions Tour of Arezzo and was placed in the CSI5* Grand Prix competitions of Doha, Helsinki and Hamburg.

Dam: Dancha B brings in the valuable genes of Up To Date and is a daughter of the successful broodmare Fabiola. She produced the 1.60m showjumper Ihorn, ridden by Juan Carlos Garcia.

Closely related to: VDL Adancha Z is bred out of Dutch damline and related to numerous international showjumpers. In addition to her uncle Ihorn, Adancha Z is also related to Overloon of Katie Prudent-Monahan.

horses.name: VDL Escape Z, gelding by Elvis Ter Putte born 2016
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Escape Z - Gelding - Chestnut - Born: 2016 Height: M - Competing at 1.40m level

VDL Escape Z is a son of Elivis ter Putte the stallion that has an unbelievable record producing GP Horses like Levis the Muze from Hanah Mytolie. Combined with top Sire Corland this brings high expectations and Escape Z proves that. VDL Escape Z ticks all the boxes if we speak about quality, intelligence and honesty! With experience up to 1.40m level he already is on schedule for his age to step up the level this year. With VDL Escape Z you buy something special!

Sire: Elvis ter Putte is one of the most influential sons of the great Diamant de Semilly. The Grand Prix showjumping stallion has produced countless international showjumpers, such as Levis de Muze, Mosito van het Hellehof, Manchester van ‘t Paradijs, Juristo van het Hagenhof, Nikita du Roton and Ikigai.

Dam: Zomein is a highly successful broodmare, producing international showjumpers such as Filemon, Impossible Z and Captain Z. Zomein combines the world-class stallion Corland with the double Olympic champion Jus de Pomme.

Closely related to: VDL Escape Z’s family has been successful for many generations. In addition to the successes of dam Zomein, granddam Pomein produced Grand Prix showjumpers Wokarde-E, Cicomein VDL and Epomein. Especially Cicomein VDL has been highly successful up to 1.50m level, ridden by multiple different riders including Darragh Kenny.

horses.name: VDL Mont Blanc, Gelding by Glasgow van 't Merelsnest born 2017
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Mont Blanc - Gelding - Chestnut - Born: 2017 - Height: L - Competing at 1.20m level

VDL Mont Blanc is a son of VDL Glasgow van’t Merelsnest who was very successful with Jur Vrieling at Championships, Grand Prix and World Cups. Combined with Baltic VDL who is climbing the ranks of the WBFSH Sire ranking with offspring such as Leone Jei and Faltic B. Mont Blanc is a gorgeous type with a flashy colour, a real modern sport horse, length in body with blood. He is a horse that needed time to grow into his tall and young body before developing through the levels. Now he is showing in the 1.20m level and is ready to step up. He gives a great feeling when riding him and you can feel the scope. He is a careful horse, quick take off, good reflex and has a lot of scope. VDL Mont Blanc has the potential to grow into a great Grand Prix horse.

Sire: VDL Glasgow van ’t Merelsnest was not only a world-class showjumper himself, he has also already produced world-class showjumpers. Some examples of exceptional offspring include High Five of Fernando Martinez Sommer and Imperial HBF of Tim Gredley.

Dam: Ficalien DN is a daughter of the upcoming top sire Baltic VDL – with offspring like Leone JEI (Martin Fuchs) and Faltic HB (Ben Maher), he is one of the very best of his generation. In breeding, Ficalien DN already produced the 1.50m showjumper Jicalien DN of Mel Thijssen. Ficalien DN eventually traces back to a thoroughbred damline. 

Closely related to: VDL Mont Blanc DN is the half-brother of the highly talented international showjumper Jicalien DN and is bred from a performance family. This damline also produced the successful Thelma Hastak of both Sophie Hinners and Stephanie Holmén and the 1.50m showjumper Disckoboy DN of Oliver Fletcher.

horses.name: VDL Kintaro, gelding by Cardento born 2015
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Kintaro - Gelding - Grey - Born: 2015 - Height: L - Competing at 1.35m level

VDL Kintaro is a son of the legendary Cardento who has for years been ranked in Top 10 at the WBFSH Sires Ranking. Kintaro is from the same family as Todd Minikus former top horse Olinda. VDL Kintaro is a very pretty gelding with a very well balanced canter that is easy and light to ride. He is brave and scopy and gives a very comfortable feeling. VDL Kintaro is a great Amateur horse for all levels.

Sire: Cardento is a three time Olympic silver medalist and one of the most renowned sires in recent years. Offspring such as Catch Me Not S, Grand Slam VDL, Katanga van ‘t Dingeshof, Kilkenny and C-Vier are among world’s very best sporthorses.

Dam: Guioletta M brings in the genes of Guidam and was bred out of the Bruno-damline, an interesting family with plenty of sport. Kintaro VDL was originally approved by SWB as a stallion and Guioletta M’s other son Lamar produced the international showjumper Lamar.

Closely related to: VDL Kintaro’s damline goes back to the successful Zeus mare Diana. She produced the 1.60m showjumping mares Olinda and Vayana. Olinda was highly successful with Todd Minikus at top level, Vayana competed at 1.60m level with Valentina Isoardi.

horses.name: VDL Cagaro, gelding by Stolzenberg born 2015
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Cagaro - Gelding - Dark bay - Born: 2015 - Height: M - Competing at 1.55m level

With the extra addition of Cagaro to the collection of WEF Sport Horse Auction, a Grand Prix showjumping horse has been included in this year’s selection. Cagaro is just turning 9 years old and already competed up to 3* Grand Prix level in Europe and was successful on many occasions. At the age of only 8, Cagaro finished 3rd in the CSI3* 1.50m of Leeuwarden, 3rd in the 1.45m Ranking classes of Valencia and Lichtenvoorde and competed successfully in his first CSI3* Grand Prix in Lichtenvoorde. All of these performances make him one of the most promising upcoming horses on the Dutch circuit. He was in the end of the year 2023 number 5 of all 8 year old horses worldwide showing at International level in the Hippomundo Ranking. Cagaro is clever and super to ride. He jumps with a great technique, is careful, has a good use of his body and is very athletic. The scope speaks for itself, Cagaro is a Grand Prix jumper with a lot of promise for the future for High Amateur to High Juniors and from U25 classes to Grand Prix. Cagaro is ready to perform!

Sire: Stolzenberg is a Hannoverian stallion bringing in the valuable genes of both Stakkato and Sandro Z. He produced many successful and competitive horses, such as Hello Shelby (Scott Brash), Salt’n Peppa (Jodie Hall McAteer) and Gain Line (Simon Delestre).

Dam: Dam Cagari is considered a highly successful broodmare in Germany. She did not only produce Grand Prix showjumper Cagaro, but also produced the international competitors Eric B and Cascan.

Closely related to: In addition to Stolzenberg, Cagaro carries the genes of the world-famous stallion Calypso II, arguably one of the most influential sons of Cor de la Bryere. Finally, Cagaro traces back to the Oldenburger mare Wega. She stood at the basis of multiple success horses, including Avec Courage d’Amour, Dragon Leon and Lino – who all competed up to international Grand Prix leve

horses.name: VDL Camacho, gelding by Crunch born 2016
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Camacho - Gelding- Bay - Born: 2016 - Height: L - Competing at 1.40m level

VDL Camacho is a son of Crunch combined with Landadel, both great sport producers. VDL Camacho is a bloody type horse that gives a great feeling, athletic canter which makes this a very competitive horse. He jumps with a great technique, is careful and is very athletic in his scope. VDL Camacho is a winner.

Sire: Crunch was a successful 1.60m showjumper with Rolf-Göran Bengtsson and combines the Grand Prix stallion Clarimo and Canturo in his pedigree. As a sire, Crunch has already produced successful Grand Prix showjumpers such as Crunchy of Takashi Haase Shibayama and Chill MA of Pius Schwizer.

Dam: M-Cohiba is a Holsteiner mare by the great Landadel and finally traces back to a Hannoverian damline. M-Cohiba’s dam Walissa produced for instance the Hannoverian approved stallion Witbooi and is the dam of 1.50m showjumpers Ladilu and Lasilissa. 

Closely related to: The damline of VDL Camacho has produced many international showjumpers over the years. Some examples are Ladooga of Charles Luyckx, Coralissa of Sam Walker and Quantico of Holger Wulschner. Camacho traces back to the Hannoverian damline 1191503.

horses.name: VDL Nova fan 'E Five, gelding by Inaico VDL born 2018
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Nova Fan‘e Five - Gelding - Born: 2018 - Height: L - Competing at 1.10m level

VDL Nova Fan‘e Five brings the blood of Inaico VDL to this auction. Inaico VDL is the full brother to Scott Brash former top mare Hello My Lady. VDL Nova fan’e Five is a modern type sporthorse with length in the body and blood. He is a very comfortable horse with a light canter and very straight forward. He is a real pleaser. When he jumps he is very light from the floor, quick in the legs, is very consistent on the jump and has a lot of athletic scope. He is a horse every barn would like to have. He is for the professional level but also can be for an amateur.

Sire: Inaico VDL is a son of leading sire Indoctro out of a dam by the legendary Baloubet du Rouet. Inaico VDL is himself the full brother of world-class showjumper Hello M’Lady of Scott Brash. In breeding, Inaico VDL passes on his striking technique, rideability and reflexes. One example is his promising son McAllister VDL – approved by KWPN.

Dam: Zolivia VDL is bed out of one of the most successful breeding lines of VDL Stud. She goes back to a Selle Français family and her great-granddam Olivia Rouge is the full sister of the legendary Papillon Rouge. In breeding, Zolivia VDL produced the international showjumper Dior VDL and Halivia VDL and in addition, she is the half-sister of the famous KWPN stallion Glenfiddich VDL.

Closely related to: VDL Nova Fan ‘e Five’s damline is one of the most successful French families. Granddam Tolivia VDL produced Glenfiddich VDL as well as the international showjumpers De Blue
VDL and Ivar VDL. Other Grand Prix relatives of Nova Fan ‘e Five are the legendary Papillon Rouge, Quartz Rouge, Vancouver VDL, Nathan des Hayettes, Cincaba Rouge, Estrella de V and Qualoubet Rouge.

horses.name: VDL Marvin, gelding by Inaico VDL born 2017
horses.catalog_text:
VDL Marvin - Gelding - Grey - Born: 2017 - Heihgt: L - Competing at 1.35m level

VDL Marvin is a gelding from the first crop of the International jumping stallion Inaico VDL.
VDL Marvin is a half brother to Grand Prix horse Aksai Chin. VDL Marvin is a gelding with a good type, he has a balanced canter and is easy to ride. He is a real “ring horse” very competitive. VDL Marvin is a horse that has enough blood and has a good instinct in the course. He is a careful but brave horse who has quick take off, opens his haunches well at the jump and has scope. VDL Marvin is a potential Grand Prix horse for Professionals and Amateur riders.

Sire: Inaico VDL is a son of leading sire Indoctro out of a dam by the legendary Baloubet du Rouet. Inaico VDL is himself the full brother of world-class showjumper Hello M’Lady of Scott Brash. In breeding, Inaico VDL passes on his striking technique, rideability and reflexes. One example is his promising son McAllister VDL – approved by KWPN.

Dam: Sancara VDL is a direct daughter of top mare Zancara – one of the leading broodmares of VDL Stud. Sancara VDL’s sire Cilton is a son of Calando I and competed up to 1.50m level. Sancara VDL herself produced the 1.50m showjumper Aksai Chin VDL as well as the NRPS and Zangersheide approved stallion Landino VDL.

Closely related to: Granddam Zancara is dam of the Olympic silver medalist and team world champion Bubalu VDL of Jur Vrieling – one of the most successful Dutch horses of his generation. Zancara is also dam of 1.60m showjumpers Montreal VDL, Pessoa VDL, Radan VDL and Wilton John VDL. Furthermore is she the full-sister of the famous Grand Prix showjumper Aldato of Emile Hendrix.
